bosonic_125.verdict: Gap too large for particle masses; confirms |A₅| = 60 theorem

lepton_125.verdict: Cannot extract lepton masses without photon (ρ₅); 216×216 essential

dark_fermionic_59.theorem: 59 = |A₅| - 1: vacuum mode forbidden for fermion-boson boundary
dark_fermionic_59.physical_meaning: Fermions cross boundary only with boson; vacuum channel blocked
